# Issue label configuration (GitHub applies these on repo creation / via UI).
# This file is documentation + a ready-to-apply snippet for a token with repo:admin scope.
#
# Apply with:
#   gh label create bug --color d73a4a --description "Something is broken" || true
#   gh label create enhancement --color a2eeef --description "New behavior" || true
#   gh label create documentation --color 0075ca --description "Docs / wiki" || true
#   gh label create dependencies --color 0366d6 --description "Dependency update" || true
#   gh label create ci --color ffb24d --description "CI / workflows" || true
#   gh label create security --color b60205 --description "Security-sensitive" || true
